description: Launched in 2013 as a playful parody of Bitcoin, Dogecoin (DOGE) became one of the world’s most iconic memecoins through vibrant online communities and global fan support. Now on AtlantisChain — the world’s only ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain — DOGE gains 0.031-second transaction speed, a fixed ultra-low gas fee of 0.0000002 ATC, and AI contract capability, transforming it into a secure, interoperable digital asset for everyday use.
name: Dogecoin
